message:
test(unit): expand inline tests for web.rs, pool.rs, recorder_storage.rs (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add ~90 new unit tests across three under-tested modules:
- web.rs: 70 tests covering WebServerConfig, ApiResponse, query parsing,
  EventStreamChannel, stream frames, redact_json_value, event matching,
  view type conversions, and serialization roundtrips
- pool.rs: 12 tests covering error variants, edge cases (zero max_size,
  large timeouts), acquire-vs-put counting, try_acquire, has_connection
- recorder_storage.rs: 12 tests covering whitespace batch_id rejection,
  CorruptRecord/QueueFull error classes, default config validation,
  checkpoint noop, lag consumer sorting, serde roundtrips

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
